name: Path Equivalence: '/multiple//internal/slash'
description: The product does not properly handle paths containing multiple consecutive internal slashes ('//'), which most filesystems normalize to a single slash, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls that match the multi-slash form literally.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with multiple consecutive internal slashes that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't normalize duplicate slashes before comparison, while the OS resolves them equivalently at STORAGE[file_access]
